name: Hetzner Agent
description: Operates Hetzner Cloud servers, DNS zones, and Storage Boxes from chat. Reads by default; confirms every change and shows its cost first.
author: HybridAI

presentation.cardDescription: Runs your Hetzner Cloud from chat — launches and right-sizes servers, manages DNS and Storage Boxes, and flags savings. Reads by default and confirms every change with its cost first.
